catalog_category: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Automatic Taper
short_description: The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless.
description: The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless. The Columbia Taper is a precision built tool that has been perfected over 38 years, but now it is also significantly lighter than all other tapers on the market and dent proof. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to our easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The Patent Pending Pump Action cutting sleeve gives the operator a smoother glide over teflon bearings, superb grip and the pull ring is great for higher ceilings. The Predator maintains it’s stable temperature and remains warm to the touch. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. The Titanium pull rod is just another detail that adds style and edge to this innovative, unique taper. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you. Features: Handmade from Carbon Fiber and steel components Titanium pull rod Adjustable Brake Quick release for tape changing Reduced Drag system for corners Stainless steel side plates, creaser arms and cable drum Quick release cap NEW Very smooth Patent Pending Pump Action cutting system with a roller chain 53″ in length Machined in our state of the art factory in Canada

short_description: Columbia Taping Tools introduces the world's first Mini Carbon Fiber Taper, The Predator "Sawed Off" Mini.
description: Columbia Taping Tools introduces the world's first Mini Carbon Fiber Taper, The Predator "Sawed Off" Mini. Unlike other taper bodies made mostly from aluminum, the Predator's Carbon Fiber construction, makes this precision-engineered tool 20% lighter and more durable then any standard mini taper on the market. Another unique benefit of this Dent Proof construction, is that Carbon Fiber maintains temperature stability, meaning this taper will remain warm to the touch. The 6 wheel cutting sleeve has been updated in favor of teflon sliders which gives the operator a smoother glide and better grip. Now, changing the sliders out is simple field maintenance and can be installed with a standard screwdriver in minutes as opposed to half an hour or more. The pull ring is ideal for higher ceilings. The Predator will tape flats and angles effortlessly with less drag in the corners. The quick release cap makes cleaning a breeze and the stainless steel side plates, cable drum, and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. With style, functionality, and durability the Predator from Columbia takes the -Evolution of Taping- to a whole new level. Predator "Sawed Off" Mini is perfect for taping drywall in small rooms and closets when a full size taper is too cumbersome. Features: Handmade From Carbon Fiber and Steel Components. Titanium Pull Rod. Adjustable Brake. Quick Release For Easy Tape Changing. Zero Drag System For Corners. Knurled Sleeve With Pull Ring. Stainless Steel Side Plates, Creaser Arms And Cable Drum. Quick Release Cap. NEW Patent Pending Pump Action Sleeve Offe

New, ultra-reliable door plate wiper resists expansion or deterioration, for long-term ease of operation and greater reliability. 10" Hinged Drywall Flat Finisher Box by Columbia Taping Tools has a new improved wiper on the pressure plate, combined with a smooth pivoting hinge axle, making this one of the easiest drywall flat finisher boxes to operate when finishing drywall butt joints and flat seams. 10" Hinged Flat Box by Columbia Taping Tools is an excellent choice for base or finish coating tape seams. Features: Hinged pressure plate and quick release tabs for extremely easy cleanup! 10" Columbia Hinged Flat Box is excellent for applying base coat or finish coat on drywall flat seams. "Commercial Grade" pressure plate wiper resists expansion or corrosion for easy operation and long service life. Aluminum wheels with o-ring tires are long lasting and smooth running. Compatible with all leading brands of flat box handles (except Tapeworm) Can be operated with or without pressure plate springs Smooth operation without door springs is possible due to reduced drag of Integrated Pressure Door Axle.

short_description: Columbia Taping Tools 12" Hinged Drywall Flat Finisher Box features precision joint compound metering adjustment for top quality finish surfaces on drywall butt joints and flat seams.
description: Columbia Taping Tools 12" Hinged Drywall Flat Finisher Box features precision joint compound metering adjustment for top quality finish surfaces on drywall butt joints and flat seams. Integrated door axle and pressure plate system allows smooth, easy operation and quick access for easy cleanup! New, ultra-reliable door plate wiper resists expansion or deterioration, for long-term ease of operation and greater reliability. 12" Hinged Drywall Flat Finisher Box by Columbia Taping Tools has a new improved wiper on the pressure plate, combined with a smooth pivoting hinge axle, making this one of the easiest drywall flat finisher boxes to operate when finishing drywall butt joints and flat seams. 12" Hinged Flat Box by Columbia Taping Tools is an excellent choice for finish coating tape seams. Features: Hinged pressure plate and quick release tabs for extremely easy cleanup! 12" Columbia Hinged Flat Box is excellent for applying finish coat on drywall flat seams. "Commercial Grade" pressure plate wiper resists expansion or corrosion for easy operation and long service life. Aluminum wheels with o-ring tires are long lasting and smooth running. Compatible with all leading brands of flat box handles (except Tapeworm) Can be operated with or without pressure plate springs Smooth operation without door springs is possible due to reduced drag of Integrated Pressure Door Axle.

catalog_title: Columbia 3' 180 Degree Grip Flat Box Handle
catalog_category: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Flat Box Handles
short_description: The New 36" Feather Weight 180º handle allows for a full braking capability over the entire 180º angle span.
description: The New 36" Feather Weight 180º handle allows for a full braking capability over the entire 180º angle span. Grips the axle with a tremendous amount of pressure to eliminate the possibility of slippage when dealing with difficult angle situations. As a result, this produces cleaner, quicker and more efficient application of joint compound. A very versatile design that provides the best possible braking at any angle. Extra strong billet aluminum design for years of rugged usage. Less moving parts mean less breakdowns. These handles feature strong billet aluminum design with black metal anodizing, and laser engraving. Everything you want in a box handle combined with a feather weight, large diameter (1 1/4" diameter) tube - helps you achieve the perfect balance, and perfect finish. Features: Feather Weight - Lightest Box Handles Around Clamp style 180 brake is simple and more durable than pinch brakes Strong billet aluminum design with black anodizing, and laser engraving Feather weight large diameter (1.25in) tube design for perfect balance and desired pressure point Additional braking, control, and range of motion versus competitor handles Compatible with all leading brand boxes (Excluding TapeWorm). 36" Feather Weight 180-Grip is ideal for wall work, tight areas, butt joints, and low ceilings

source_lines: 76TT - EasyClean® Pump 76XLTT - Extra Long EasyClean® Pump 76TT-CA - EasyClean® Pump
catalog_category: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Pumps
short_description: The TapeTech 76TT EasyClean® Loading Pump combines reliability with innovation.
description: The TapeTech 76TT EasyClean® Loading Pump combines reliability with innovation. The 76TT features the slim tube design preferred by professional finishers and robust construction for dependable performance and long life. The TapeTech 76TT Loading Pump has a redesigned head and a new Twist-lock foot valve that provides secure attachment and easy removal for cleaning and maintenance. And the 76TT does not require a paper gasket for the filler adapter or gooseneck due to an innovative, integrated O-Ring that provides a terrific seal with fewer headaches from lost, worn or damaged paper gaskets. The 76TT pump accepts the standard 85T gooseneck and 90T filler adapter. Features Fills Automatic Tapers (with 85T gooseneck) Fills finishing boxes, MudRunner®, corner applicators and nail spotters (with 90T filler adapter)

source_lines: 07TT-C - EasyClean® Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper 07TT - EasyClean® Automatic Taper
catalog_category: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Tapers
short_description: The TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Automatic Taper redefines quality, durability and value.
description: The TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Automatic Taper redefines quality, durability and value. The Taper simultaneously applies tape and the correct amount of joint compound for all drywall joints - dramatically improving taping efficiency. The EasyClean® cover plate can be removed with just a quarter turn for quick and easy cleaning or service. The stainless steel side plates, along with a hard anodized push rod and cable drum, prevent corrosion and provide long life. The adjustable brake allows you to set and maintain the desired tension on the main wheels. The control tube has enclosed rollers to provide the most comfortable grip while protecting your hands from the pinching that can occur with other brands. The integrated hook on the spool keeper lets you hang the taper from framing or scaffolding. The smaller diameter of the new tube protector provides maximum comfort and requires no tools to remove for easy cleaning and cable replacement. All these features make the new 07TT Taper the best choice for professional drywall finishers. Features Applies joint compound and tape to butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Applies joint compound and tape to internal corners on walls and ceilings Easy clean cover plate Stainless steel side plates Hard anodized push rod and cable drum Adjustable brake Enclosed rollers on control tube Integrated hook Smaller diameter tube protector Includes (1) 050081F Extra spring (1) 054209F Extra main cable assembly (1) 056133 Extra pyramid blade (1) 059049 Extra gooser needle

seo_description: The TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Automatic Taper redefines quality, durability and value.

source_lines: the 16TT Applicator Head to a Corner Applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT), the 14TT MudRunner® or a Compound Tube (CT24TT, CT36TT, CT42TT) to simplify and
catalog_category: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Applicator Heads
short_description: Operation The Mud Head is designed to place a consistently wide ribbon of joint compound to each side of the internal or external corner for installation of paper tape or corner bead.
description: Operation The Mud Head is designed to place a consistently wide ribbon of joint compound to each side of the internal or external corner for installation of paper tape or corner bead. Snap the Mud Head onto the corner applicator or MudRunner® and fill it with joint compound. Start at one end of the corner and apply pressure to the corner applicator or MudRunner™ to start the flow of compound while moving the tool along the corner to the opposite end. Now apply the tape or corner bead. Maintenance Clean thoroughly with brush and water (or water hose) to remove all joint compound from the tool. After the tool is clean, lightly oil with Ames® Bazooka® Oil or any light machine oil. 16TT Schematic

description: The TapeTech EasyRoll Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The adjustable feature of this tool refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the corner finisher. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator or the 14TT MudRunner to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. EasyRoll Adjustable Corner Finishers have wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle - not included. short_description: Introducing the new Power Assist MAXXBOX finishing boxes from TapeTech .
description: Introducing the new Power Assist MAXXBOX finishing boxes from TapeTech . Now you can have the extra capacity you want with half the effort required from other high capacity finishing boxes. Featuring the same smart design that matches the usable capacity to the application, the Power Assist MAXXBOX is sure to become the industry standard for finishing! These boxes work with all TapeTech finishing handles, including the 8000TT-PA Wizard handle for Power Assist boxes. With a usable joint compound capacity that varies by less than 10% across the range, the TapeTech Power Assist finishing boxes hold the right amount of joint compound to keep you on the wall longer without wearing you out. The Power Assist series features TapeTech s famous EasyClean design. The adjustable crown setting dial allows the user to easily adjust the amount of joint compound applied over the tape on the drywall joint. This is very helpful when progressing from the first embedding application to the second or third finishing coat. The pivoting axle helps to compensate when the drywall or sheetrock on one side of the joint is higher than the other side of the joint. The new EasyRoll wheel system allows you to expertly finish all types of outside corner bead up to two times faster than finishing by hand. EasyRoll wheels work with all types of outside corner bead including metal, paper-faced, vinyl and bullnose. short_description: The new QuickBox QSX from TapeTech is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds.
description: The new QuickBox QSX from TapeTech is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds. The 6 QuickBox QSX is the perfect tool for contractors who use fast-setting joint compound for the first coat over the paper or fiberglass joint tape. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox QSX with a few light taps. The glass-filled polypropylene shell provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. The optimized blade design matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. And it takes just a few seconds to change the long-lasting blades. QuickBox QSX works with all finishing box handles, including the Wizard . Now you can combine the speed and consistency of finishing boxes with the speed of fast-setting joint compound! Includes: (1) QuickBox QSX (1) QB60035 Blade (1) QB60235 Blade

description: The TapeTech EasyFinish® Box Handles attach to the TapeTech EasyClean™, EasyClean™ High Capacity or Power Assist™ Finishing Boxes and provide control to cleanly sweep the boxes off the joint for a perfect finish. short_description: The Wizard™ makes magic happen!
description: The Wizard™ makes magic happen! The new model 8000TT/8000TT-PA Wizard handle from TapeTech provides unmatched control, maximum access and eliminates the learning curve of using traditional finishing box brake handles. The Wizard is the only finishing box handle that places your hand directly over the pressure plate, reducing the effort required while providing superior control. The Wizard fits into the smallest closets or under stairs and is much safer for workers on scaffolding compared to using a finishing box handle of any other length. The innovative design, including the ability to reverse the front handle, allows for multiple ergonomic hand positions to reduce worker fatigue and increase productivity. Every drywall finisher needs the Wizard™ in their toolbox!

catalog_category: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Accessories
short_description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool.
description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model FHTT. The base handle for the extension handle system is model XHTT. The base handle fits the corner roller, corner applicator and nail spotter without any adapters. The heavy duty, easy-to-change adapter (CFA-TT) connects the new handles to the corner finishers, and the new, optimal diameter makes TapeTech handles the most ergonomic in the industry. Both base handles feature a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the new handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter.
